ops.text: athome campaign preflight: when the baseline scorer crashes (here: cc-steer ImportError from a venv/worktree cc-transcript skew), the ledger records only "preflight_failed ... baseline produced non-finite metric None" — the scorer's actual stderr (the ImportError one-liner sitting in the 171-byte withheld run log) never surfaces, so the operator diagnoses from nothing. The candidate-side infra_log marker path exists for units but evidently didn't classify an import crash as infra for the baseline. Owner fix: include the scorer log tail (or at least its last line) in the preflight_failed ledger detail, and consider import-error signatures for the infra marker list.
